I've reviewed your reservation AEQEPE, Mei. I can see that this was for flight HAT255 from Denver to Miami on May 8, 2024. Unfortunately, this flight has already been completed (it landed on May 8th).

Since the flight has already been taken, most modifications are no longer possible. The reservation system doesn't allow changes to completed flights.

Is there anything else I can help you with regarding this reservation or any other travel needs?
